source.name: Population data for 2020 (UNWPP, 2019)
source.dataPublishedBy: United Nations, Department of Economic and Social Affairs, Population Division (2019). World Population Prospects: The 2019 Revision, DVD Edition.
source.additionalInfo:
All population figures (with the exception below) are as they appear in the latest United Nations World Population Prospects (UNWPP) release. Available at: https://esa.un.org/unpd/wpp/Download/Standard/Population/

To combine with datasets from other sources we have also included population estimates for Serbia and Kosovo separately. The UN includes Kosovo in Serbian population estimates.

We have added data for Kosovo in 2020, sourced from the CIA World Factbook: https://www.cia.gov/library/publications/the-world-factbook/geos/print_kv.html.

Serbia figures were then calculated by subtracting the figure for Kosovo from the UN population figure. We have renamed the UN Serbian figure 'Serbia (including Kosovo)'. Serbian figures excluding Kosovo are named 'Serbia'.

In the case of Cyprus we use an adjusted population figure of 875,899; this figure is the population adjustment factor used by the European CDC, our data source on confirmed COVID-19 deaths and cases. The ECDC reports cases and deaths as reported from the Cyprus government, which excludes cases from Northern Cyprus. To remain consistent with COVID-19 cases and death adjustments, we use this population figure as provided by the ECDC.

145451.name: Total confirmed deaths due to COVID-19

source.name: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 10 March, 08:05 (London time)
source.dataPublishedBy: COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University
source.additionalInfo: Raw data on confirmed cases and deaths for all countries is sourced from the COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University. Our complete COVID-19 dataset is a collection of the COVID-19 data maintained by Our World in Data. It is updated daily and includes data on confirmed cases, deaths, hospitalizations, and testing. We have created a new description of all our data sources. You find it at our GitHub repository here. There you can download all of our data.
